text: Going along slushy country roads and speaking to damp audiences in draughty schoolrooms day after day for a fortnight, he'll have to put in an appearance at some place of worship on Sunday morning, and he can come to us immediately afterwards.

going along slushy country roads and speaking to damp audiences in drafty schoolrooms day after day for a fortnight. He'll have to put in an appearance at some place of worship on Sunday morning and he can come to us immediately afterwards. I have a dream that one day this nation will rise up and live out the true meaning of its creed. And so, my fellow Americans,
